title: E/C.12/AUS/CO/6 — Recommendations — Australia
text:
Domestic application of the Covenant
5. The Committee reiterates its previous recommendation relating to this area and recommends that the State Party strengthen the role of the Parliamentary Joint Committee on Human Rights by affording it adequate time and procedural safeguards to review draft legislation before parliamentary decision-making, and that the Joint Committee ’ s findings be systematically considered and responded to.
